title: Lesson 137: (Grammar) - need not; (not) have to; need not have; need not e...

intro_cards.title: Lack of Obligation: なくてもいい
intro_cards.body:
なくてもいい means 'don't have to ~' — no obligation required.

Pattern: [ない form] → drop い → add くてもいい

• 来なくてもいいです。(You don't have to come.)
• 全部食べなくてもいいよ。(You don't have to eat everything.)
• 急がなくてもいいですよ。(There's no rush.)

Contrast:
• なくてもいい = no obligation (don't have to)
• てもいい = permission (it's okay to)
• なくてはいけない = obligation (must / have to)
